articles.description: The American push for high-stakes talks with Iran has hit a snag. Iranian officials didn't travel to Switzerland as planned for the talks and are insisting that fighting in Lebanon must stop first. That's according to three regional officials and person famil…
articles.content: ZURICH (AP) The American push to quickly begin high-stakes talks with Iran hit a snag Friday, just days after the signing of an agreement that opens a two-month window for negotiations on Tehrans nuc… [+7320 chars]

articles.title: How and why algae clouded Trump's vision for an 'American flag blue' Reflecting Pool - NPR
articles.description: The shallow, sunny waters of the reflecting pool are an ideal incubator for algae growth in the summertime. Experts say the recent renovation may have helped accelerate it.
articles.content:

articles.author: Becky Sullivan
articles.title: The U.S. may face Australia in the World Cup without star Christian Pulisic - NPR
articles.description: The left winger Pulisic was key to the Americans' fluid and effective attack in last week's win over Paraguay. But he was kicked in the calf, left at halftime, and hasn't trained with the team since.
articles.content:
